```text
85	pub fn from_key(ev: KeyEvent, mode: InputMode, quit_confirm_open: bool) -> Action {
86	    // Quit-confirm dialog hijacks input: y/Y confirms, anything else cancels.
87	    if quit_confirm_open {
88	        return match ev.code {
89	            KeyCode::Char('y') | KeyCode::Char('Y') => Action::ConfirmYes,
90	            _ => Action::ConfirmNo,

92	    }
93	    if ev.modifiers.contains(KeyModifiers::CONTROL) && matches!(ev.code, KeyCode::Char('c')) {
94	        return Action::Quit;
95	    }
96	    match mode {
97	        InputMode::Picker => match ev.code {
98	            KeyCode::Up | KeyCode::Char('k') => Action::PickerUp,

100	            KeyCode::Enter | KeyCode::Char(' ') => Action::PickerSelect,

103	            KeyCode::Esc => Action::Quit,
104	            _ => Action::None,
105	        },
106	        InputMode::Lobby => match ev.code {

108	            KeyCode::Down | KeyCode::Char('j') => Action::PickerDown,

110	            KeyCode::Char('c') => Action::LobbyCreate,
111	            KeyCode::Char('r') => Action::LobbyRefresh,
112	            KeyCode::Char('w') => Action::LobbyWatch,
113	            KeyCode::Char('q') => Action::Quit,
114	            KeyCode::Char('?') => Action::HelpToggle,
115	            KeyCode::Esc => Action::Back,
116	            _ => Action::None,
117	        },
118	        InputMode::Text => match ev.code {
119	            KeyCode::Esc => Action::Back,
120	            KeyCode::Enter => Action::Submit,
121	            KeyCode::Backspace => Action::TextBackspace,
122	            KeyCode::Tab => Action::FocusNext,
123	            KeyCode::BackTab => Action::FocusPrev,
124	            KeyCode::Char(c) => Action::TextInput(c),
125	            _ => Action::None,
126	        },
127	        InputMode::CustomRules => match ev.code {
128	            KeyCode::Up | KeyCode::Char('k') => Action::PickerUp,
129	            KeyCode::Down | KeyCode::Char('j') => Action::PickerDown,
130	            KeyCode::Enter | KeyCode::Char(' ') => Action::PickerSelect,
131	            KeyCode::Backspace => Action::TextBackspace,
132	            KeyCode::Char(c) if c.is_ascii_digit() => Action::TextInput(c),
133	            KeyCode::Char('q') => Action::Quit,
134	            KeyCode::Char('?') => Action::HelpToggle,
135	            KeyCode::Esc => Action::Back,
136	            _ => Action::None,
137	        },
138	        InputMode::Game => match ev.code {

146	            KeyCode::Enter | KeyCode::Char(' ') => Action::SelectOrCommit,
```

```text
826	            | Action::Submit => self.dispatch_text(action),
827	            Action::ChatStart => self.dispatch_chat_start(),
828	            Action::CoordStart(kind) => self.dispatch_coord_start(kind),
829	            Action::LobbyWatch => {
830	                if matches!(self.screen, Screen::Lobby(_)) {

834	            _ => match &self.screen {
835	                Screen::Net(_) => self.dispatch_net(action),

837	                Screen::Picker(_)
838	                | Screen::HostPrompt(_)
839	                | Screen::Lobby(_)
840	                | Screen::CreateRoom(_)
841	                | Screen::CustomRules(_) => {}
842	            },
843	        }
844	        // Local moves go through dispatch_game / dispatch_coord_*, both of
845	        // which can land us on a terminal status. Re-check after every
846	        // dispatch so the confetti trigger fires reliably regardless of the
847	        // entry path. Net status is checked separately in `tick_net`.

849	        self.note_status_transition(cur, false);
```

```text
1384	/// Map a Local game's outcome to the kind of big banner to draw. Local
1385	/// (hot-seat) play gets neutral "RED WINS / BLACK WINS / DRAW" copy
1386	/// because both seats share the same screen — calling either side
1387	/// "VICTORY" or "DEFEAT" would be misleading. Returns `None` while the
1388	/// game is still ongoing or for unsupported variants.
1389	fn endgame_kind_local(status: &GameStatus, _observer: Side) -> Option<BannerKind> {
1390	    match status {
1391	        GameStatus::Ongoing => None,
1392	        GameStatus::Won { winner, .. } => Some(BannerKind::Outcome(neutral_side_for(*winner))),
1393	        GameStatus::Drawn { .. } => Some(BannerKind::Draw),
1394	    }
1395	}
1396	
1397	/// Map a Net game's outcome. Players see VICTORY/DEFEAT keyed off their
1398	/// own seat; spectators always see the neutral RED WINS / BLACK WINS
1399	/// copy. Returns `None` while ongoing or before the role handshake.
1400	fn endgame_kind_net(status: &GameStatus, role: Option<NetRole>) -> Option<BannerKind> {
1401	    match (status, role) {
1402	        (GameStatus::Ongoing, _) => None,
1403	        (GameStatus::Drawn { .. }, _) => Some(BannerKind::Draw),
1404	        (GameStatus::Won { winner, .. }, Some(NetRole::Player(seat))) => {
1405	            if *winner == seat {
1406	                Some(BannerKind::Victory)
1407	            } else {
1408	                Some(BannerKind::Defeat)
1409	            }
```

全部通過。功能完整實作了。

---

投降功能已完成，以下是所有改動：

**按鍵**：遊戲中按 `s` 觸發投降

**流程**：
- 本地熱座模式：按 `s` → 彈出紅色確認框「Resign? 投降?」→ 按 `y` 執行，對手（即另一方 `side_to_move.opposite()`）獲勝，`WinReason::Resignation`，confetti 效果正常觸發
- 連線模式：按 `s` → 同樣的確認框 → 按 `y` 傳送 `ClientMsg::Resign` 給伺服器（伺服器端的投降處理本來就已完整）
- 旁觀者 / 遊戲已結束時按 `s`：顯示提示訊息，不開啟確認框

**防呆**：確認框是 `y`/任意鍵 的設計，跟 quit 確認框一致，且兩者互斥不會重疊。

---

```text
+    fn dispatch_resign(&mut self) {
+        match &self.screen {
+            Screen::Game(g) => {
+                if !matches!(g.state.status, GameStatus::Ongoing) {
+                    return;
+                }
+                self.resign_confirm_open = true;
+            }
+            Screen::Net(n) => {
+                let is_player = n.role.map(|r| r.is_player()).unwrap_or(false);
+                let is_ongoing = n.last_view.as_ref().is_some_and(|v| {
+                    matches!(v.status, GameStatus::Ongoing)
+                });
+                if !is_player || !is_ongoing {
+                    if let Screen::Net(n) = &mut self.screen {
+                        n.last_msg = if !is_player {
+                            Some("Spectators cannot resign.".into())
+                        } else {
+                            Some("No game in progress.".into())
+                        };
+                    }
+                    return;
+                }
+                self.resign_confirm_open = true;
+            }
+            _ => {}
+        }
+    }
+
+    fn execute_resign(&mut self) {
+        match &mut self.screen {
+            Screen::Game(g) => {
+                let winner = g.state.side_to_move.opposite();
+                g.state.status = GameStatus::Won { winner, reason: WinReason::Resignation };
+            }
+            Screen::Net(n) => {
+                let _ = n.client.cmd_tx.send(ClientMsg::Resign);
+            }
+            _ => {}
+        }
+    }

+fn draw_resign_confirm_overlay(frame: &mut Frame, area: Rect) {
+    let w = 52u16;
+    let h = 7u16;
+    let pad_x = area.width.saturating_sub(w) / 2;
+    let pad_y = area.height.saturating_sub(h) / 2;
+    let overlay = Rect {
+        x: area.x + pad_x,
+        y: area.y + pad_y,
+        width: area.width.min(w),
+        height: area.height.min(h),
+    };
+    frame.render_widget(Clear, overlay);
+    let block = Block::default()
+        .borders(Borders::ALL)
+        .title(" Resign? 投降? ")
+        .border_style(TuiStyle::default().fg(Color::Red));
+    let lines = vec![
+        Line::from(""),
+        Line::from(Span::styled(
+            "  Concede the game to your opponent?",
+            TuiStyle::default().add_modifier(Modifier::BOLD),
+        )),
+        Line::from(Span::styled(
+            "  Press y to resign, anything else to keep playing.",
+            TuiStyle::default().fg(Color::Gray),
+        )),
+    ];
+    let para = Paragraph::new(lines).block(block).wrap(Wrap { trim: false });
+    frame.render_widget(para, overlay);
+}
```

<tool-use data-tool-type="shell" data-tool-name="Bash"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Bash**</summary>
Commit resign feature

```bash
git add clients/chess-tui/src/app.rs clients/chess-tui/src/input.rs clients/chess-tui/src/main.rs clients/chess-tui/src/ui.rs && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
feat(chess-tui): add resign (投降) with y/N confirm + full victory FX

Press 's' in Game or Net mode to resign. A red "Resign? 投降?" modal
asks for confirmation (y = confirm, anything else = cancel). On
confirmation:
- Local: sets GameStatus::Won { winner: opponent, reason: Resignation }
  directly, so confetti + banner fire via the existing status-transition
  hook.
- Net: sends ClientMsg::Resign to the server (server-side handling was
  already complete).

Guards: spectators and players when the game is already over are shown
an error message instead of the confirm dialog. quit_confirm and
resign_confirm are mutually exclusive and both feed the same y/N
keymap intercept path in from_key.

s=resign added to sidebar hint lines and both HELP_LINES / HELP_LINES_NET.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"
```
